ground_truth.title: Music Teacher Reviews and Testimonials | Vibe Music Academy
ground_truth.main_content:
My teacher... ...is very good at assessing a student's abilities and interests and adjusting his lessons accordingly. He makes the lessons fun and challenging. — Karen B.

...has gone out of his way to learn about my son and his interests so when my son was introduced to guitar, he was able to learn and play music that he already enjoys listening to. He is a gifted musician but also highly skilled at teaching. He works well with families and has a flexible schedule. He is fair but firm with students, and I highly recommend Vibe Music Academy! — Martin S.

...is kind, friendly and patient with my son. He has vast musical experience and is an excellent teacher. The highlight for me was hearing my son have a jam session with the teacher - my son played the drums and the teacher played the guitar! — Kelly S.

...walked me through music theory, as well as the details of the guitar. As an adult student, I was nervous about picking up an instrument but I am now pretty confident I can learn how to play the guitar. Thanks for the great lesson and I look forward to many more! — Ted S.

...has a wonderful ability to relate to people. He has excellent skill and enthusiasm, making our son WANT to learn. We highly recommend him... — B. H.

...taught our Kindergarten-aged daughter both piano and guitar lessons. She was not only able to learn from him, but she really enjoyed him as a teacher, as well... I would highly recommend him as a teacher. — Whitni B.

Get your first lesson for free
